title: Vicloon Baby Bottle Brush, 3 in 1 Bottle and Teat Cleaning Brush, Silicone Bottle Cleaner Brush for Cleaning Water Bottles Baby Bottles Glass Cup Thermoses, Green
features: 👶【3-in-1 Design】The all-in-one cleaning brush contains 3 brushes and holder. Contains a brush with a large head and long silicone bristles for cleaning baby bottles of all shapes.

👶【High Quality】The baby bottle cleaning brush is made of high quality silicone material, soft, no smell, BPA free, non-toxic and durable. The bristles of the bottle brush always retain their shape and won't break or unravel.
👶【Silicone Bristles】The soft silicone bottle brush head will not scratch the bottle body and will not deform. The long, comfortable, ergonomic handle is perfect for cleaning hard-to-reach places.
👶【Easy to Store】Three-in-one set, hidden integrated storage, the straw brush and pacifier brush are hidden in the body, perfectly combined with the bottle brush, easy to disassemble and store.

👶【Wide Applications】The silicone bottle cleaner brush of different sizes are suitable for cleaning all kinds of bottles, including straws, beer/wine glasses, sports bottles, baby bottles, thermos bottles, breast pumps, kitchen utensils and other hygienic cleaning.
description: Product Description Vicloon baby bottle cleaning brush The Pedestal Bottle Cleaning Brush Trio includes a bottle brush, a nipple brush and a straw brush. Bottles of different sizes can be cleaned more carefully and comprehensively. The base design makes your storage more convenient and tidy. Baby Bottle Cleaning Brush Silicone material, BPA free, healthy and non-toxic, safe to use The soft bristles are completely scratch-resistant and ensure thorough and gentle cleaning. The cleaning brush set thoroughly and effectively cleans bottles of all shapes and sizes. Suitable for the nipple-shaped brush head Tightly fit the nipple brush head, easy to remove dirt, and more convenient to clean the nipple. Silicone brush head, no deformation when pulling Food grade silicone brush head, simply wash and dry after use, no water stains. Easy to clean, 360° omnidirectional The 360 degree rotating handle design allows you to use it more conveniently and clean more thoroughly.
